Item 2.02 Results of Operations and Financial Condition.

On April 17, 2026, NVIDIA Corporation (“NVIDIA”) announced financial results for the fiscal period ended January 26, 2026.

Revenue was $XX.X billion, up YY% year over year. GAAP gross margin was ZZ.Z%.
